working_on: Author /ship multi-model orchestration skill (Issue #76) — SKILL.md + synthesis-template + ADR 0081 + first-exercise readiness note + cascade to /review + /security-review + STATE.md + ENGINE_LOG + MemPalace decision drawer + in-session dogfood.
outcome_summary: /ship multi-model orchestration skill (Issue #76, SWE-hardening Tier 3 first closure) landed at .claude/skills/ship/SKILL.md + synthesis-template.md + ADR 0081 + first-exercise readiness note. Composes /review + /security-review + coverage-delta as three parallel sub-agents via single-message-multiple-Agent-calls. Recommendation gate (NO-GO friction), not merge gate. ADR 0081 dogfoods ADR 0077 with four explicit Alternatives Considered. Cascade per ADR 0041: /review + /security-review forward-pointers updated same commit. In-session dogfood verdict was NO-GO (3 Required from /review cluster signal); all three fixed in-session per feedback_no_session_cascade.md (wrong filename, Agent name verification, Skill-self-exclusion clause). Coverage PASS (79.88%); security clean. T1-A + T1-B closed in-session via dogfood per readiness note. MemPalace decision drawer authored (per decision drawer drawer_wing_paideia_decisions_2bff3a9f8ebb81c019c8550b, wing_paideia/decisions). Per pushback drawer: not applicable (no surfaced unnamed risk warranted formal capture). Per lesson drawer: not applicable (no procedural-failure-with-non-obvious-cause). Validator: 0 hard-fails. ENGINE_LOG [Unreleased] Added entries authored. STATE.md Current row + SWE-hardening Tier 3 #76 strike + S-0148 verification block updated.

scope_delivery.explanation: All planned deliverables landed end-to-end: SKILL.md + synthesis-template + ADR 0081 + first-exercise readiness note + cascade to /review + /security-review + STATE.md + ENGINE_LOG + MemPalace decision drawer + Issue #76 close-out comment + in-session dogfood with full Tier-1 closure (T1-A verdict emission + T1-B parallel-agent observation). Dogfood verdict was NO-GO but per the user-approved plan, any verdict counts as Tier-1 closure; the three Required findings were applied in-session as a follow-on deliverable commit. No scope reduction; no reordering.

side_discoveries.reasoning: The 'Tier-2 follow-up forward-pointers' phrase in the commit message refers to the readiness note's Tier-2 section, which IS the disposition surface. Each forward-pointer (first non-dogfood invocation, first NO-GO, cluster-signal matrix tightening, gh run view workflow filtering, etc.) is named there with the expected closure-trigger.
'gap-pending NO-GO' is the verdict-label qualifier per ADR 0081 decision 5 (sub-agent failure mode); 'pending' here is part of a fixed terminology, not a deferral marker.

Historical reference inside the cascade-update prose: '...forward-pointers updated from "pending" to "landed at S-0148 per ADR 0081"'. This describes the pre-S-0148 state of the cascade-target docs (now resolved by the cascade itself), not a current deferral.
